title: NodeInfo hardcodes users.total=1 instead of counting accounts
description: discovery.rs nodeinfo handler: the NodeInfo 2.0 response hardcodes "users": { "total": 1 } instead of querying SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts. For a multi-persona smallhold instance (the system supports multiple personas), this reports incorrect statistics to census services and other instances. Fix: query the accounts table count and also provide users.activeMonth and users.activeHalfyear per the NodeInfo spec.
